stemHtml: What is the effect of an inoperative anti-skid system on aeroplane performance?

options.a: V<sub>1</sub> remains the same, but the Regulated Take-Off Mass (RTOM) decreases.
options.b: The performance remains unaffected when using an auto-brake system and thrust reversers.
options.c: It increases the landing distance required due to a reduced braking capability.
options.d: The Regulated Take-Off Mass (RTOM) is only affected on a wet runway.
